prompt: Generate an artwork in the style of image 1, featuring the crane from image 2 seen through a window, with a woman gazing at it from inside.
prompt_refined: Generate an artwork in the Ukiyo-e woodblock print style of image 1. The scene features a traditional Japanese interior with a large, open architectural view (like a sliding door or window) looking out onto an outdoor setting. Through this opening, a flying crane, matching the form and flight of the crane in image 2 but rendered in the style of image 1, is clearly visible in the distance. Inside the room, a woman dressed in traditional Japanese attire is positioned to gaze intently towards the crane outside.
objects: Large, open architectural view (like a sliding door or window)
Outdoor setting (visible through the open view)
Flying crane (visible in the distance through the opening)
Woman in traditional Japanese attire (inside the room, gazing towards the crane)
